01 / 03

Interactive Models

3D Models I have built in CAD modelling softwares. Drag to rotate & scroll to zoom.

Racecar

A full formula-style racecar body, modelled with aerodynamic bodywork, suspension geometry, and roll-cage structure.

Watch

A mechanical watch casing and dial assembly, studying precision tolerances and surface finish workflows in Fusion 360.

Engine

An internal combustion engine block modelled component-by-component to understand mechanical assemblies and constraints.

Selected Work

Eleven years ago, Edna Mode gave one of the greatest engineering lessons of all time: "No capes!" While a cape adds superhero flair, it doesn't solve a problem. That's the philosophy behind how I build: cutting unnecessary features and asking What is the simplest solution to the real problem?

My Process

I start most projects with a sounding board (someone to bounce early ideas off of to see how they land), and a pencil. Everything begins as a messy spider diagram on paper before I figure out what it actually wants to become.
